mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_agencies (company_name, company_slug, business_number, address, address_detail) VALUES (#{companyName}, #{companySlug}, #{businessNumber}, #{address}, #{addressDetail})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_agencies SET company_name = #{companyName}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
